scripts.build:desktop-sidecars: TARGET="$(rustc -vV | awk '/^host:/ {print $2}')" && env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo build --target "$TARGET" --manifest-path crates/daemon/Cargo.toml && env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo build --target "$TARGET" --manifest-path crates/kanna-cli/Cargo.toml && env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo build --target "$TARGET" --manifest-path crates/kanna-server/Cargo.toml && env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo build --target "$TARGET" --manifest-path crates/task-transfer/Cargo.toml && env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo build --target "$TARGET" --manifest-path packages/terminal-recovery/Cargo.toml && scripts/stage-sidecars.sh --target "$TARGET"
scripts.firebase:emulators:test: pnpm exec firebase emulators:exec --project kanna-local --only auth,firestore,functions "pnpm test"
